untranslatable_reason: Flag pattern requires visual/geometric pattern recognition (parallel trend lines, consolidation bounds, price action reversal midpoint detection) which cannot be fully expressed using only point-in-time indicator comparisons and basic operators. The signal requires trend line detection and parallel line geometry that are not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy translation using volume contraction (vol_ratio_20 < 1.0), declining volatility (atr compression), and price containment within Bollinger Bands. However, this does not capture the core flag pattern definition: (1) two parallel trend lines, (2) consolidation bounds, (3) midpoint positioning in a move, or (4) preceding steep trend. The success rates (64% bull, context-dependent bear) and average moves (23% rise) cannot be operationalized without the geometric pattern itself. A proper implementation would require custom pattern recognition logic outside this rule engine.
